author: o1xhack
description: Bidirectional task sync with Todoist. Subtasks, import, projects, labels, inline query blocks, and completed-task queries. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: o1xhack
manifest.description: Bidirectional task sync with Todoist. Subtasks, import, projects, labels, inline query blocks, and completed-task queries.
manifest.name: Sync Todoist

name: Sync Todoist

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## Sync Todoist 1.1.1

This release adds a safe historical Daily Note backfill workflow.

### Added

- New **Backfill past Daily Notes** workflow with preview and apply steps.
- Quick date presets for recent 7 days, recent 30 days, this month, and last month.
- Date picker inputs for selecting historical backfill ranges.
- Optional **Create missing Daily Notes** setting, disabled by default.
- Reporting for missing Daily Notes and invalid Sync Todoist marker regions.

### Safety boundaries

- Backfill writes only inside the configured Sync Todoist Daily Note marker region.
- Files with invalid markers are skipped and reported.
- Marker content outside the managed region is not changed.
- Backfill never creates, updates, completes, or deletes Todoist tasks.
- Existing **Sync today's daily note** behavior is preserved.

### Todoist history limits

Historical backfill can only use data Todoist can still provide reliably:

- current active tasks,
- completed-task archive results,
- available activity-log snapshots for completed recurring occurrences.

Sync Todoist does not fabricate historical unfinished rows, task moves, or task states that Todoist can no longer prove.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## New: Daily Note recurring controls

- Adds **Include incomplete recurring tasks** under Daily Note settings.
- Lets users hide active recurring Todoist tasks whose current occurrence is due today while keeping ordinary active tasks visible.
- Keeps the option enabled by default so existing Daily Note behavior is preserved after upgrade.
- Keeps **Include completed recurring tasks** as a separate option for completed recurring occurrences.

## Completed recurring behavior tightened

- When **Include completed recurring tasks** is off, Sync Todoist now also excludes recurring tasks returned by Todoist completed-task archive queries.
- Recently completed recurring snapshots are only merged into Daily Note output when completed recurring inclusion is enabled.

## Documentation and update notes

- Updated English and Simplified Chinese README content.
- Updated the in-app bilingual update notes for version 1.0.0.
- Updated the manual test spec with incomplete recurring Daily Note coverage.

## Validation

- Passed `npm run lint`.
- Passed `npm test`.
- Passed `npx tsc --noEmit`.
- Passed `npm run build`.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## New: Clean up past Daily Notes

- Adds **Clean up past Daily Notes** under Daily Note settings, below **Sync Daily Note now**.
- Opens a preview-and-confirm modal instead of changing files immediately.
- Only edits Sync Todoist marker regions in past Daily Notes. Content outside the managed marker block is never touched.
- Todoist tasks are never deleted by this cleanup tool.

## Cleanup modes

- **Remove unfinished tasks no longer due on that day**: removes historical generated rows when the Todoist task is still active but its current due date no longer matches that Daily Note date. This covers tasks moved from an old Daily Note date to today or another future date.
- **Mark completed historical tasks**: changes stale historical rows from `[ ]` to `[x]` when Todoist confirms the task has been completed.
- **Remove completed historical tasks**: removes historical generated rows when Todoist confirms completion, for users who prefer cleaner past Daily Notes.
- The default cleanup mode can also mark completed historical tasks at the same time via an optional checkbox.

## Safety and preview behavior

- Past Daily Notes remain historical snapshots during normal sync. Cleanup only runs when the user explicitly opens and applies it.
- The modal previews scanned files, eligible past Daily Notes, changed files, rows removed, rows marked completed, skipped unknown Todoist IDs, invalid marker files, and errors.
- Unknown or missing Todoist IDs are skipped by default.
- The cleanup uses active Todoist tasks plus completed-task archive lookups by both due date and completion date.
- Completed-task archive lookups are split into Todoist-safe date ranges, so scanning past Daily Notes older than six weeks no longer fails with Todoist's due-date range limit.

## Existing 0.8 behavior retained

- Daily Note completed-task modes remain available: hide completed tasks, show completed tasks due today, or show all tasks completed today.
- Existing users still migrate the old completed-task toggle to the previous completed-today behavior.
- Version row and bilingual update notes remain in General settings.

## Validation

- Passed `npm run lint`.
- Passed `npm test`.
- Passed `npx tsc --noEmit`.
- Passed `npm run build`.
- Verified the real Todoist API paths used by cleanup with temporary Inbox tasks. Active task lookup and completed archive lookups by due date and completion date succeeded; temporary tasks were cleaned up successfully.
- Re-verified the real Todoist completed-task archive API with a long 2026-01-01 to 2026-05-16 scan split into four date ranges. Both due-date and completion-date completed archive queries returned successfully.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## Daily Note completed-task modes

- Replaced the old **Include completed tasks** toggle with a clearer **Completed tasks** selector.
- Added three modes: **Do not show completed tasks**, **Only tasks due today**, and **All tasks completed today**.
- The default remains conservative: completed tasks are hidden unless the user opts in.
- Existing users who had the old completed-task toggle enabled are migrated to **All tasks completed today**, preserving the previous behavior.
- The Daily Note source task lookup now uses Todoist completed-task queries by due date for **Only tasks due today**, and by completion date for **All tasks completed today**.

## Recurring completed tasks

- Kept **Include completed recurring tasks** as a separate option.
- The recurring option now appears whenever completed tasks are shown.
- Sync Todoist continues to use Todoist activity logs to recover completed recurring occurrences after Todoist advances the task to the next occurrence.

## Settings UI and update notes

- Updated the settings tab style to match Sync Trakt: the active tab now uses a stronger accent underline, which is much easier to see on mobile.
- Added a version row at the top of **General** settings showing the current version and build time.
- Clicking the version opens bilingual update notes.
- Update notes now open automatically after users upgrade to a new version, and can also be reopened manually from the version row.

## Documentation and release tracking

- Added `CHANGELOG.md` as the ongoing change history.
- Updated English and Simplified Chinese README content.
- Updated the manual test spec for the new completed-task modes.

## Validation

- Passed `npm run lint`.
- Passed `npm test`.
- Passed `npx tsc --noEmit`.
- Passed `npm run build`.
- Verified the real Todoist completed-task API paths with temporary Inbox tasks: `by_due_date` includes only tasks due today, while `by_completion_date` includes tasks completed today regardless of due date. Temporary test tasks were cleaned up successfully.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## 0.7.0

- Adds structured due handling for all-day dates, floating local times, fixed times, and recurring occurrences.
- Supports Markdown floating-time syntax such as 📅 2026-06-01 15:00 and due:2026-06-01 15:00.
- Sends editable floating times to Todoist with due_datetime.
- Preserves fixed-time and recurring Todoist metadata with hidden todoist-due comments and prevents unsafe downgrades to one-time date-only tasks.
- Fixes Daily Note completed recurring recovery by querying Todoist activity logs with the required list parameter and using the completed occurrence date instead of the next due date.
- Preserves recurring completions made during the current sync cycle while Todoist Activity Log is still delayed.
- Preserves Obsidian wikilink headings such as [[note#heading]] instead of treating the heading anchor as a Todoist label.
- Shows version/build information at the bottom of General settings.
- Documents current limitations for Todoist duration, sections/boards, natural-language recurrence editing, fixed-time timezone editing, and Daily Note generated block edits.
- Updates import, query block, and Daily Note due display.
- Adds unit/API/manual test coverage for due parsing, formatting, payloads, sync rules, and Daily Note safeguards.

### Current limitations

Duration and sections are preserved in Todoist when Sync Todoist updates other fields, but they are not shown, created, edited, or fully synchronized from Markdown in this release. Edit those fields in Todoist.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
## Sync Todoist 0.6.2

- Adds Daily Note completed recurring task inclusion behind the completed-task setting.
- Allows Daily Note generated rows to sync checkbox completion while preventing generated title/date/project/label/priority fields from overwriting Todoist.
- Protects timed and recurring Todoist due rules from being downgraded to date-only Markdown during Daily Note and ordinary imported-task sync.
- Restores ordinary imported task rows back to Todoist current due date when a Markdown date-only edit cannot be safely pushed.
- Adds unit tests for Daily Note generated-row selection, completion guards, timed due parsing, and due-rule push protection.
- Includes Community Plugin review cleanup from the withdrawn 0.6.1 patch.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Daily Note due-date fix.

- Fixed Daily Note filtering so Todoist due datetimes that fall today count as due today.
- Covers timed tasks and current recurring task occurrences whose active due datetime is today.
- Deferred the separate completed recurring occurrence fallback until this narrower fix is verified in real use.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Daily Note completed-task fix.

- Fixed Include completed tasks to include Todoist tasks marked completed today, regardless of due date.
- Completed tasks are now fetched by completion date instead of due date.
- Updated English and Simplified Chinese docs/settings text to match the corrected behavior.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Daily Note polish release.

- Added English and Simplified Chinese settings UI, including the Daily Note tab.
- Added Daily Note primary sort: time first or priority first, with stable fallback ordering.
- Added optional inclusion of completed Todoist tasks due today so completed items stay sorted in the Daily Note block.
- Added a bilingual warning that the managed Daily Note marker region is fully rewritten during sync.

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Notification default fix for BRAT.

What's changed:
- Automatic sync notices are now enabled by default.
- Desktop and mobile use the same automatic sync notice setting.
- Removed the separate mobile automatic notice setting.
- Scheduled sync notices include zero-change summaries when automatic notices are enabled.
- Errors and conflicts still surface regardless of the automatic notice setting.

Validation:
- npm run lint
- npx tsc --noEmit
- npm test
- npm run build

Release assets for BRAT and manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Notification polish release for BRAT.

What's new:
- Adds a shared Sync Todoist notice layer so plugin notices consistently start with "Sync Todoist:".
- Manual sync now shows a concise completion summary with created, updated, completed, conflicts, errors, and Daily Note status counts.
- Scheduled sync can show completion notices on desktop when enabled, including zero-change summaries.
- Scheduled sync can show auto-dismissing mobile notices when the mobile automatic sync notice setting is enabled.
- Errors and conflicts still surface even when scheduled success notices are disabled.
- Daily Note manual and automatic sync paths now report clear Daily Note outcomes.

Validation:
- npm run lint
- npx tsc --noEmit
- npm test
- npm run build

Release assets for BRAT and manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Daily Note task sync release for BRAT.

What's new:
- Adds a 每日 Daily Note settings tab.
- Writes today's matching Todoist tasks into today's Obsidian Daily Note between configurable source-mode markers.
- Adds project, label, and priority multi-select filters; empty selections mean all.
- Loads Todoist projects and labels after API verification.
- Adds a manual "Sync today's daily note" command and runs Daily Note refresh during normal sync.
- Preserves content outside the managed marker region and refuses to write when markers are malformed.

Release assets for BRAT and manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Initial Sync Todoist BRAT release.

This release adds completed-task support for query blocks. Use `include_completed: true` with options such as `completed_by`, `completed_since`, `completed_until`, or `completed_range` to include matching completed Todoist tasks alongside active query results.

Release assets for BRAT and manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
